languages.text: Архимилитант Иждриг Батошски руководил своим полком до глубоких седин. Получив сложноизлечимое ранение в бою и уйдя с высокого поста, Батошски встретил смерть на Заркове в роли сержанта-инструктора и родоначальника клана потомственных военных.

Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.
languages.original_text: Архимилитант Иждриг Батошски руководил своим полком до глубоких седин. Получив сложноизлечимое ранение в бою и уйдя с высокого поста, Батошски встретил смерть на Заркове в роли сержанта-инструктора и родоначальника клана потомственных военных.

traits.locale_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

languages.text: アーチ・ミリタント・イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは、老齢まで彼の連隊を率いた。戦場で重傷を負い、高位ポストを辞任した後、バトシュスキーはザルコフで訓練士として、そして長い軍人の系譜の父として命を落とした。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

traits.locale_text: アーチ・ミリタント・イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは、老齢まで彼の連隊を率いた。戦場で重傷を負い、高位ポストを辞任した後、バトシュスキーはザルコフで訓練士として、そして長い軍人の系譜の父として命を落とした。

languages.text: 首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基统领他的军团直至暮年。因在战场上身受重伤、落下残疾，他辞去了高级职务，退居扎尔科夫。在那里，他以操练军士的身份辞世，并留下了延续多代的军人血脉。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基统领他的军团直至暮年。因在战场上身受重伤、落下残疾，他辞去了高级职务，退居扎尔科夫。在那里，他以操练军士的身份辞世，并留下了延续多代的军人血脉。

languages.text: L'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski resta à la tête de son régiment jusqu'à un âge avancé. Après avoir subi une grave blessure sur le champ de bataille qui le contraignit à quitter son poste haut placé, il finit ses jours en tant que sergent-instructeur sur Zarkov, où il forma une longue lignée de soldats.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski resta à la tête de son régiment jusqu'à un âge avancé. Après avoir subi une grave blessure sur le champ de bataille qui le contraignit à quitter son poste haut placé, il finit ses jours en tant que sergent-instructeur sur Zarkov, où il forma une longue lignée de soldats.

languages.text: El Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski lideró a su regimiento hasta su vejez. Tras sufrir una herida incapacitante y renunciar a su alto puesto, Batoshski murió en Zarkov como sargento instructor y padre de un amplio linaje de soldados.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

traits.locale_text: El Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski lideró a su regimiento hasta su vejez. Tras sufrir una herida incapacitante y renunciar a su alto puesto, Batoshski murió en Zarkov como sargento instructor y padre de un amplio linaje de soldados.

languages.text: Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski, yaşlanana dek alayını yönetti. Savaş alanında kendisini sakat bırakan bir yara aldıktan ve yüksek rütbeli görevinden istifa ettikten sonra Batoshski, Zarkov'da bir eğitim çavuşu ve uzun bir asker soyunun atası olarak ölümü karşıladı.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski, yaşlanana dek alayını yönetti. Savaş alanında kendisini sakat bırakan bir yara aldıktan ve yüksek rütbeli görevinden istifa ettikten sonra Batoshski, Zarkov'da bir eğitim çavuşu ve uzun bir asker soyunun atası olarak ölümü karşıladı.

languages.text: Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski befehligte sein Regiment bis ins hohe Alter. Nachdem er in der Schlacht eine schwere Verletzung erlitten und sich von seinem Posten zurückgezogen hatte, starb Batoshski auf Zarkov als Ausbilder und Vater einer langen Linie von Soldaten.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.
